markets.rules_primary: If Pittsburgh and Washington go to extra innings in the Pittsburgh vs Washington professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 3, 2026 at 6:45 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.title: Will there be extra innings in the Pittsburgh vs Washington game originally scheduled for Jul 3, 2026 at 6:45 PM EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Washington wins the Pittsburgh vs Washington professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 3, 2026 at 6:45 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Pittsburgh vs Washington professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 3, 2026 at 6:45 PM EDT. If this game is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled game has finished (within two days). If the game is cancelled or rescheduled to over two days away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
markets.title: Pittsburgh vs Washington Winner?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.

markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 30, 2026 8 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 95.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 95.99° on Jun 30, 2026 at 8pm EDT?
